description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a long, slender barrel and a prominent wooden stock, reminiscent of early to mid-20th century submachine guns. The stock and foregrip are made of dark, polished wood, providing both aesthetic appeal and ergonomic support. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from matte black metal, with a drum magazine mounted beneath the action, suggesting high ammunition capacity. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights, and the muzzle is unadorned, lacking any visible suppressor or compensator. The overall silhouette is robust yet streamlined, with a distinct separation between the wooden and metal components. This firearm is likely intended for use in urban environments, where its compact length and high rate of fire would be advantageous.
description: A classic rifle with a dark wooden stock, black metal receiver, and a drum magazine, featuring iron sights and a long barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, black receiver, and drum magazine.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular drum magazine and the alignment of the barrel and iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the wooden stock and metal components.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the stock and the top of the receiver, with the barrel extending forward.
